title: sesamum calycinum subsp. pseudoangolense
intro: Sesamum calycinum subsp. pseudoangolense, also known as the Benin sesban, is a plant species that belongs to the family Pedaliaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits of Sesamum calycinum subsp. pseudoangolense include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions such as eczema and dermatitis, as well as its use as an antiseptic and antipyretic. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
